judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent ignored the “last month” purchase requirement and, after a Product2 name LIKE query returned an empty set, prematurely concluded it couldn’t identify the product instead of using transaction data (e.g., orders/line items) to find the correct Product2 Id.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent simply returned the Product2Id from the most recent OpportunityLineItem for the contact (ordering by CloseDate/CreatedDate) without filtering to “last month” (June 2021) or ensuring the product is the “AI processing unit,” as shown by the second query which lacks any date or product-name criteria, leading to the wrong product Id.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misinterpreted "last month" and filtered transactions using a rolling 30-day window (e.g., WHERE CloseDate/EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-15' AND < '2021-07-16' in the contributing opportunity and order queries), leading to empty results and the incorrect "no purchase" conclusion.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved the contact’s opportunities and, instead of filtering to “last month” relative to 2021-07-15 (June 2021), it took the topmost (2023-12-15) opportunity "#006Wt000007BIjxIAG" and returned its product "01tWt000006hVebIAE", leading to a mismatch with the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving two opportunities for the contact between 2021-06-01 and 2021-07-14 (call_xmb9nnRh2DEbyFtCPeumiHJq), the agent pulled all associated product IDs (call_kp9boahmNAaPsxnQsjwT5KLi) and then returned the first Product2 Id from the lookup (call_5zTAFbV0Mb7PWs6vV3r7lN66) without restricting to exactly last month (June) or filtering by the "AI processing unit," resulting in the wrong product Id.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
